name: Sonic Healthcare Limited
analysis: SHL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$20.5400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$20.6000, stop A$19.1219, target A$22.7486 (1.45:1) — then trail it.
